input.text:
Analyze the Lighthouse SEO audit results below.
For each failing audit, describe the search visibility impact and why it matters.
Use only supplied Lighthouse audit IDs and titles. Do not invent audits.
Severity: critical (deindexing risk), high (significant ranking impact), medium (moderate impact), low (minor).
Return JSON only matching the schema.

Page URL: https://example.com/blog/post-1
Failing audits: 1
Extracted audits: [{"id":"meta-description","title":"Document does not have a meta description","severity":"high"}]

Output must include: "label": "extract"

Analyze the Lighthouse SEO audit results below.
For each failing audit, describe the search visibility impact and why it matters.
Use only supplied Lighthouse audit IDs and titles. Do not invent audits.
Severity: critical (deindexing risk), high (significant ranking impact), medium (moderate impact), low (minor).
Return JSON only matching the schema.

Page URL: https://example.com/products/chair
Failing audits: 3
Extracted audits: [{"id":"meta-description","title":"Document does not have a meta description","severity":"high"},{"id":"document-title","title":"Document does not have a valid title","severity":"critical"},{"id":"link-text","title":"Links do not have descriptive text","severity":"medium"}]

Output must include: "label": "extract"
